property_data.description: MOVE IN READY! Experience an exceptional opportunity in the highly sought-after Creekstone subdivision! This  stunning four-bedroom, 2.5-bath home is perfectly situated on a desirable corner lot, offering a spacious and modern  living environment. This 2 story, 2252 sq ft home on a partially wooded lot is steps away from your community pool and playground. Impeccably maintained, it features freshly painted interiors, new carpeting and engineered hardwoods.  An open-concept floor plan that seamlessly connects the living area to the gourmet kitchen, boasting elegant granite countertops and stainless steel appliances. In addition, the kitchen offers 42" cabinets with soft close drawers, large island for bar seating, and additional glass front storage cabinets. The second level features a generously sized primary suite with granite double vanity, large walk in shower, and spacious walk in closet. Sizeable secondary bedrooms offer comfort and flexibility for family, guests, or a home office. Step outside to discover a huge flat backyard, wooded areas on two sides, and beautifully landscaped established plantings. Hardscaped seating areas and walkways make this an entertainers dream space. Buyers will love the timeless design  features throughout the home, and be charmed by the tranquil outdoor spaces. Skip the wait of new construction and the builder markup. This  is an exceptional value and a rare opportunity you do not want to miss!
